title: Light-weight high power inverter structure with equalized inductance
abstract: In an inverter that includes a smoothing capacitor and a plurality of power modules, the smoothing capacitor includes a plurality of columnar unit capacitors each having electrodes at both ends thereof, a one-end-side bus plate connected to the electrode at one end of each unit capacitor, and an other-end-side bus plate connected to the electrode at the other end of the unit capacitor. The unit capacitors are arranged, with axes thereof parallel to each other, side by side in a direction perpendicular to the axes. The unit capacitors are arranged at positions equally distant from a center of the inverter. A distance between each power module and the unit capacitor closest to the power module is constant.
claims: 1. An inverter structure of an inverter arranged adjacent to a motor in an axial direction of the motor and comprising a smoothing capacitor and a plurality of power modules arranged on an outer side of the smoothing capacitor with respect to the axial direction of the motor, wherein the smoothing capacitor includes a plurality of columnar unit capacitors each having electrodes at both ends thereof and arranged with axes thereof parallel to the axial direction of the motor, a plate-shaped one-end-side bus plate connected to the electrode at one end of each unit capacitor, and a plate-shaped other-end-side bus plate connected to the electrode at the other end of the unit capacitor, and the unit capacitors are arranged, with axes thereof parallel to each other, side by side in a direction along a plane perpendicular to the axes; and the unit capacitors are arranged at positions equally distant from an axis of the motor, and a distance between each power module and at least the unit capacitor closest to the power module is set to be constant, wherein the one-end-side bus plate and the other-end-side bus plate are circular in outer shape, wherein the inverter further comprises a negative-side input bus bar configured to connect an outer edge of the one-end-side bus plate to a negative-side input terminal of the power modules and a positive-side input bus bar configured to connect an outer edge of the other-end-side bus plate to a positive-side input terminal of the power modules, wherein the distance between the outer edge of the one-end-side bus plate and the axis of the motor and the distance between the outer edge of the other-end-side bus plate and the axis of the motor are the same, the distance between the negative-side input terminal of the power modules and the axis of the motor and the distance between the positive-side input terminal of the power modules and the axis of the motor are the same, and a length of the negative-side input bus bar and a length of the positive-side input bus bar are the same.
